compliant: We collect cookies to track user interactions and store site preferences.
Your data is processed based on your consent, which you can withdraw at any time.
We retain personal data for a period of 12 months after your last active session.
You have the right to access, rectify, or delete your personal data.
All communications are secured using SSL/TLS encryption protocols.
non_compliant: We process whatever data we feel like without telling anyone.
We don't need your agreement to track your activity across the web.
